descriptionBody: "How much cash do we have left?" "What's our CAC Payback if we hire two devs?" If these questions keep you up at 3:00 AM, welcome to the club. Most founders treat their financial models like a scary basement, terrified of what they'll find or lost in a sea of broken formulas.
section1Body: A battle-tested, "clean-code" version of the exact spreadsheets used by venture-backed startups to track growth, burn, and valuation.

catalogDescription: Stop guessing your unit economics. An investor-grade SaaS model featuring automated cohort analysis, industry benchmarks, and dual-method valuation.
title: The Pro-Grade B2B SaaS Financial Model (Advanced Edition)
subtitle: Stop Guessing Your Unit Economics. Start Raising Like a Pro.
descriptionBody: "What's our Net Revenue Retention?" "How does our Burn Multiple compare to top-quartile startups?" If investors are asking these questions and your answer is "Let me get back to you," you're leaving money on the table. You've graduated from the "scary basement" of basic runway calculationâ€”now you need to prove your growth engine actually works without paying a fractional CFO $500/hour.
section1Body: This is a heavy-duty, clean-code financial engine designed specifically for seed and Series A startups. It handles the heavy lifting on unit economics, industry benchmarking, and advanced valuation so you can focus on building.

features.name: The Cohort X-Ray
features.desc: A fully automated Monthly Cohort Analysis. Watch exactly how your retention stacks up by acquisition monthâ€”this is the exact chart VCs want to see before writing a check.

features.name: The "Top-Quartile" Benchmarks
features.desc: Stop wondering if your numbers are good. Your outputs automatically compare your Gross Margin, LTV/CAC, and Burn Multiple against top-tier B2B SaaS industry benchmarks.

features.name: The SaaS Metrics Command Center
features.desc: It doesn't just track MRR. It automatically calculates your Magic Number, Burn Multiple, Net Revenue Retention (NRR), and CAC Payback Period.

features.name: The "What If" Sensitivity Engine
features.desc: Toggle your growth rate, churn, and pricing levers by +/- 20% and watch your 3-year valuation and runway update instantly in a clean matrix.

features.name: The Two-Method Valuation Engine
features.desc: Why choose? Get your Pre-Money Valuation estimated using both ARR Multiples and a rigorous Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) method.

whyPoints.title: Save 40+ Hours
whyPoints.desc: Building an accurate cohort retention and MRR waterfall model from scratch is a nightmare. Skip the broken formulas and use that time to talk to customers.

whyPoints.title: Pass Due Diligence
whyPoints.desc: When a VC asks to see your model, you won't send a messy CSV. You'll send an investor-grade engine with built-in scenario planning.

whyPoints.title: Total Peace of Mind

footerSummaryDetails: (Cheaper than one hour with an outsourced accountant).
footerResultDetails: Complete command over your startup's financial future.
whatYouGet: A heavy-duty 3-year financial engine in a fully unlocked Excel format.
Automated cohort heatmaps to track retention by acquisition month.
Live top-quartile industry SaaS benchmarks baked directly into your dashboard.
Advanced SaaS metrics tracking (Burn Multiple, NRR, Magic Number).
A dual-method valuation engine (ARR Multiples & DCF).
Step-by-Step "Start Here" manual to plug in your numbers and get out of the spreadsheet fast.
whoThisIsFor: Seed and Series A SaaS founders preparing for VC due diligence.
Scaling startups that need to track cohort retention and advanced unit economics.
Founders who want CFO-level insights without paying $500/hour.

faq.q: I'm not a finance person. Is this too complex for me?
faq.a: Not at all. I survived the trenches of CA prep so you don't have to. Just follow the step-by-step "Start Here" guide and plug your numbers into the blue cells. The model handles the rest.

faq.q: Does this work for B2C SaaS?
faq.a: It's heavily optimized for B2B (with tiered pricing, hiring planners, and B2B benchmarks), but the core mechanics of MRR, cohorts, and metrics can absolutely be adapted for B2C if you know your way around a spreadsheet.

faq.q: What software do I need to run this?
faq.a: Microsoft Excel. It's built with advanced formulas that work perfectly natively. You can import it to Google Sheets, but some of the heavy-duty formatting and charts might shift slightly.

catalogDescription: Stop guessing your marketplace metrics. This model features dual-sided supply & demand growth, GMV waterfalls, industry benchmarks & 3-method valuation.
title: The Investor-Ready Marketplace Financial Model
subtitle: Stop Mixing Up GMV and Net Revenue. Start Raising Like a Pro.
descriptionBody: If you are building a two-sided marketplace, you already have the hardest job in the startup world: solving the chicken-and-egg problem. You shouldn't also have to spend 40 hours building a custom spreadsheet to figure out if your unit economics actually make sense. Most templates out there treat marketplaces like standard SaaS companies, which is a guaranteed way to get laughed out of a VC pitch.
section1Body: This is a battle-tested, clean-code 3-year projection engine built specifically for horizontal two-sided marketplaces. It handles the heavy lifting of dual-sided acquisition, GMV waterfalls, and marketplace-specific valuation so you can stop wrestling with formulas and get back to matching supply and demand.

features.name: The Dual-Sided Growth Engine
features.desc: Buyers and Sellers are not the same. This model lets you project supply growth, demand growth, and churn entirely separately to see exactly how your network effects scale.

features.name: The GMV to Revenue Waterfall
features.desc: No more confusion. Input your Average Order Value (AOV), transaction frequency, and Take Rate, and watch your Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) cleanly translate into actual Net Revenue.

features.name: The Marketplace Benchmarks
features.desc: Automatically compare your outputsâ€”like your Buyer-to-Seller Ratio, Take Rate, and Contribution Marginâ€”against top-tier marketplace industry standards.

features.name: The "Base / Bull / Bear" Scenarios
features.desc: Instantly switch your entire model between Conservative, Base, and Optimistic cases with one click to show investors exactly what happens if growth accelerates.

features.name: The Triple-Method Valuation Engine
features.desc: Marketplaces are valued differently. Get your Pre-Money Valuation estimated using GMV Multiples, Net Revenue Multiples, and a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF).

whyPoints.title: Save 40+ Hours
whyPoints.desc: Modeling two-sided acquisition costs from scratch is a massive headache. Skip the broken formulas and get back to growing your network.

whyPoints.title: Look Like a Pro
whyPoints.desc: When an investor asks to see your metrics, you won't send a messy CSV that accidentally double-counts revenue. You'll send a structured, professional model.

whyPoints.title: No "Broken Formula" Panic
whyPoints.desc: Every cell is linked, protected, and sanity-checked by someone who actually likes accounting.

footerResultDetails: Total clarity on your marketplace's financial future.
whatYouGet: A complete, unlocked 3-year financial projection spreadsheet (Excel format).
Dual-Sided Growth Models to independently forecast Supply (Sellers) and Demand (Buyers).
Automated GMV & Net Revenue waterfalls based on your specific take rate.
The "Vibe Check" Dashboard summarizing your GMV, Contribution Margin, and Runway.
A Triple-Method Valuation Engine (GMV Multiples, Net Rev Multiples, and DCF).
Step-by-step "Start Here" guide to populate the model in under 30 minutes.
whoThisIsFor: Two-sided marketplace founders (B2B or B2C) raising a seed or Series A round.
Startups struggling to balance buyer CAC against seller acquisition costs (SAC).
Founders who need to prove their network effects and unit economics actually scale.

faq.q: Does this work for both B2B and B2C marketplaces?
faq.a: Yes! Whether you are matching freelancers with enterprises (B2B) or individuals selling used sneakers (B2C), the core dual-sided mechanics (supply vs. demand, GMV, take rate) remain exactly the same.

faq.q: I'm not a finance person. Is this too complex?
faq.a: Not at all. I survived the trenches of CA prep so you don't have to. Just follow the step-by-step "Start Here" guide and plug your numbers into the blue cells. The model automatically does the heavy lifting.

faq.q: Can I run different growth scenarios for my pitch deck?
faq.a: Absolutely. There is a built-in Scenario Selector tab. You can plug in your conservative, base, and optimistic assumptions, and flip the entire model between them with a single drop-down menu.

catalogDescription: Stop guessing ROAS. This D2C model features automated cohort retention, multi-channel growth forecasting, and an inventory cash flow planner.
title: The D2C Brand Financial Model
subtitle: Know Exactly When to Reorder. Prove Unit Economics to Investors.
descriptionBody: "When do we reorder inventory?" "Are our Facebook ads actually profitable after COGS, shipping, and returns?" Running a consumer brand means cash flow is king and inventory is the silent killer. Most founders fly blind on reorder points, or they try to force their brand into a generic SaaS spreadsheet - a guaranteed way to stock out of your hero product or burn runway on unprofitable ad campaigns. This model solves both.
section1Body: This is a battle-tested, clean-code 3-year projection engine built specifically for modern consumer brands. It handles the heavy lifting of inventory forecasting, ad profitability analysis, cohort retention, and D2C-specific valuation so you can stop wrestling with spreadsheets and get back to building your brand.

features.name: Inventory Cash Flow Radar
features.desc: Never stock out again. Input your safety stock and lead times; the model tells you exactly when to reorder and how much cash it drains.

features.name: Ad Profitability Calculator
features.desc: Input your ad spend, ROAS, COGS, and shipping. See true contribution margin per channel, not just revenue.

features.name: 36-Month Cohort Tracker
features.desc: Watch repeat purchase rates by acquisition month. Calculate real LTV for subscription and subscription-adjacent brands.

features.name: Multi-Channel Revenue Engine
features.desc: Forecast D2C, Wholesale, Bundles, and Subscriptions separately with distinct AOVs for each.

features.name: D2C Valuation Bridge
features.desc: Revenue Multiples + DCF tailored for consumer brands, not SaaS metrics.

whyPoints.title: Never Stock Out of Your Hero Product
whyPoints.desc: Input safety stock and lead times; get automated reorder alerts before you lose a sale.

whyPoints.title: Know Your True Ad Profitability
whyPoints.desc: Most founders calculate ROAS wrong. This model subtracts COGS, shipping, and returns to show real contribution margin.

whyPoints.title: Prove Unit Economics to Investors
whyPoints.desc: VCs and banks for consumer brands care about inventory turns and contribution margins, not just ARR. Show them you understand your business.

whyPoints.title: Save 40+ Hours
whyPoints.desc: Building an accurate inventory forecast and repeat-purchase cohort model from scratch is a massive headache. Skip the broken formulas and get back to growing your brand.

whyPoints.title: Pass Due Diligence
whyPoints.desc: When an investor or lender asks for your financials, you won't send a messy CSV. You'll send a structured, professional model that shows you deeply understand your margins.

whyPoints.title: Total Peace of Mind
whyPoints.desc: Every cell is linked, protected, and sanity-checked by someone who actually likes accounting.

footerSummaryDetails: (Cheaper than stocking out of your hero product).
footerResultDetails: Total clarity on your brand's financial future and inventory needs.
whatYouGet: A complete, unlocked 3-year financial projection spreadsheet (Excel format).
Traffic & Conversion Tracker to automatically calculate your Blended CAC.
Fully automated 36-month cohort retention matrix to track repeat purchases.
Inventory Cash Flow Planner with automated reorder forecasting.
Two-Method Valuation Engine (Revenue Multiples & DCF).
Step-by-step "Start Here" manual to plug in your numbers in under 30 minutes.
whoThisIsFor: D2C founders preparing for investor pitch or bank loan
Consumer brands with physical inventory (not dropshipping)
Brands running paid ads who need to prove unit economics

faq.q: Does this work for dropshipping, or just for brands holding inventory?
faq.a: Both! If you hold physical inventory, the built-in Inventory Cash Flow Planner will track your reorder points and cash burn. If you dropship, you can simply zero out the inventory lead times and just use the multi-channel growth and cohort retention engines.

faq.q: I'm not a finance person. Is this too complex?
faq.a: Not at all. I survived the trenches of CA prep so you don't have to. Just follow the step-by-step "Start Here" guide and plug your numbers into the blue cells. The model automatically does the heavy lifting.

faq.q: Can I forecast subscriptions and standard purchases at the same time?
faq.a: Yes. The Multi-Channel Growth Engine lets you separate and forecast standard one-off D2C orders, recurring subscriptions, product bundles, and even wholesale orders all in one place.

catalogDescription: Build a fundable pitch deck in 15 minutes — just talk to the AI. Chat with an AI that asks the right questions, builds your pitch deck slide by slide, and lets you edit everything live. Export a professional PDF for ₹500.
title: Build Your Pitch Deck in 15 Minutes — Just Talk to the AI
subtitle: Stop Wrestling with Slides. Start Pitching.
descriptionBody: "We need a deck for the investor meeting tomorrow." If that sentence makes your stomach drop, you're not alone. Most founders spend hours dragging slides, rewriting bullet points, and second-guessing their messaging—only to end up with something that doesn't actually tell their story. PromptDeck AI changes that. Just chat with the AI, answer its questions, and watch your pitch deck build itself slide by slide.
section1Body: No more blank canvases or endless formatting battles. PromptDeck AI asks you the right questions—about your problem, solution, market, business model, and traction—so you can't accidentally skip the stuff investors actually care about.

features.name: AI Conversation Builder
features.desc: Chat with an AI that knows what investors want to hear. It asks smart questions, captures your answers, and turns them into compelling slide content.

features.name: Live Slide Editor
features.desc: See your deck build in real-time. Edit any slide text, reorder sections, or tweak the messaging directly—everything stays in sync.

features.name: Investor-Ready Structure
features.desc: Pre-built slide templates that cover the exact story arc investors expect: Problem, Solution, Market, Product, Business Model, Traction, Team, and Ask.

features.name: One-Click PDF Export
features.desc: Export a clean, professional PDF ready to send to investors. No formatting glitches, no broken layouts.

features.name: Multiple Revisions Included
features.desc: Keep iterating. The AI remembers your previous answers so you can refine your story without starting from scratch.

whyPoints.title: 15 Minutes, Not 15 Hours
whyPoints.desc: Skip the slide formatting nightmare. Just talk through your business and let the AI handle the rest.

whyPoints.title: Can't Miss a Key Slide
whyPoints.desc: The AI guides you through every critical section—so your deck doesn't accidentally skip the stuff that gets you funded.

whyPoints.title: Edit Until It's Right
whyPoints.desc: Nothing is locked in. Tweak the copy, reorder slides, or rewrite entire sections until your story lands.

footerResultDetails: A fundable pitch deck you actually feel confident about.

faq.q: How does the AI know what to ask?
faq.a: PromptDeck AI was trained on hundreds of successful pitch decks and investor feedback. It knows which questions matter and in what order.

faq.q: Can I edit the slides after the AI builds them?
faq.a: Absolutely. The live editor lets you tweak any text, reorder slides, and adjust messaging as much as you want.
You get a clean, professional PDF—ready to email directly to investors or upload to your data room.

faq.q: How is this different from using ChatGPT?
faq.a: PromptDeck AI is purpose-built for pitch decks. It knows the structure investors expect, asks the right questions in order, and outputs a ready-to-use slide deck—not just text.
